expected_behavior: OPA is bound to the intended interface, protected by the chosen authentication/transport controls, and management/data APIs are not anonymously exposed.
given: The OPA service is running in the local/on-prem profile.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: OPA config, listening sockets, successful authorized call, denied unauthorized call.
then: OPA is bound to the intended interface, protected by the chosen authentication/transport controls, and management/data APIs are not anonymously exposed.
verification_method: Container/network tests from allowed and disallowed peers.
when: A local authorized client and an unauthorized/remote client access its APIs.
